transcript: Uh, he's... in the bathroom right now. Wanna call back in a... little while?
Yeah, he's in the bathroom. Call back in about five, ten minutes.
What's the number in there, man?
[laughs] Yeah, he needs a different number, eh?
Yeah, call back in a little bit. Oh, hold on.
Oh, yeah? How are you doing, Lindo?
Fine. How are you doin' tonight, sir?
I have the... I have the... I have your marshmallows for you, sir.
How does that sound to you?
[slow exhale] I live on, uh... Forty, and, uh... Kemosabe.
Forty and Kemosabe, eh? Yeah, that's pretty close, I guess.
Did you talk to Mad Man Lorenzo?
I didn't talk to no Lorenzo.
I can't talk to anybody like that.
[chuckling continues] Did you talk to Pujol?
Nothin', nothin'. What are you trying to sell?
No... well, I'm really not interested in anything, anyway...
No, I don't sell nothin', bro. I just wanna see if you want the marshmallow, I'm sayin'.
Mmh... no, uh-uh. You might have me, uh... confused with somebody else.
You Delmo that works at Fingerhut, right?
Nope, I sure don't. Nope. I'm a, I'm a...
Aw, bud. How would you like, uhhh... necklace?
I'm not in... I don't have any money, anyway.
How would you like, uhhn... lamp... uhh, hombre?
Like I said, I don't have no money, anyway.
How would you lamp... how would you like a lamp sitting next to your HEAD? [exhales]
Or sittin' on your head, bud!
[laughs] No, I have one little favor to ask of you, bro.
I have a lamb. I need you to watch it for me for one month, man. While I go to Ecuador, you know?
You got the wrong guy, bud.
Aw, bud. I got one lamb, need you to watch him while I'm in Ecuador, man.
Like I said, you got the wrong person. I don't have no place to put it.
[sighs] Put my foot at your head. [exhales]
One lamb, one month? Mad Man Garcia come down?
Never heard of such a thing.
As... one lamb for one month. Or Mad Man Garcia, or any of that.
Oh... "Mad Man, Mad Lamb". The only mad man I knew was the governor.
Oh. Nice chattin' with ya, Kermit! Take it easy!
Help me with the lamb, please, Delmo? One... one month...
I don't have no place to put it.
Did you talk to Mad Man Pujol?
Your Pujol... Mad Man. I tell you, you got the wrong person.
Delmo, you take care of yourself, my friend.
